changes: Opo-Opo Form: Effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Raptor Form: Effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Coeurl Form: Effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Mantra: Radius increased from 7 to 15 yalms.
Form Shift: The coeurl form bonus 'Extends Greased Lightning duration to maximum' has been added.
Meditation: The additional effect 'Opens all five chakra when used outside of combat.' has been added.
Riddle of Earth: Earth's Reply bonus now nullifies all action direction requirements.
Riddle of Fire: The effect 'increases weaponskill recast time by 15%' has been removed. Damage increase reduced from 30% to 25%.
The Forbidden Chakra: The condition 'Can only be executed while in combat' has been added.
Enlightenment: The condition 'Can only be executed while in combat' has been added.
Gust Slash: Combo potency increased from 250 to 300.
Meikyo Shisui: Recast time reduced from 60 to 55 seconds.
Meditate: Effect duration increased from 30 to 45 seconds.
Tsubame-gaeshi: Cast time has been made instant.
Kaeshi: Higanbana: Cast time has been made instant.
Kaeshi: Goken: Cast time has been made instant.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Cast time has been made instant.
Shoha: Potency has been changed from 50/100/200/300/500 to 100/300/400/450/500.
Hagakure: New action added at level 68.
Reassemble: Recast time reduced from 60 to 55 seconds.
Summon: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Summon II: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Summon III: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Bio: The delay before the detrimental status is applied has been reduced.
Bio II: The delay before the detrimental status is applied has been reduced.
Bio III: The delay before the detrimental status is applied has been reduced.
Tri-disaster: The delay before the detrimental status is applied has been reduced.
Jolt: MP cost has been reduced from 300 to 200.
Verthunder: MP cost has been reduced from 400 to 300.
Veraero: MP cost has been reduced from 400 to 300.
Verfire: MP cost has been reduced from 300 to 200.
Verstone: MP cost has been reduced from 300 to 200.
Jolt II: MP cost has been reduced from 300 to 200.
Verflare: MP cost has been reduced from 500 to 400.
Verholy: MP cost has been reduced from 500 to 400.
Scorch: MP cost has been reduced from 500 to 400.
Enchanted Reprise: Potency increased from 220 to 250. Mana requirements changed from 10 Black Mana and 10 White Mana to 5 Black Mana and 5 White Mana.
Art of War: Potency increased from 150 to 160.
Broil Mastery: Effect changed from 'increases the potency of Ruin II to 160' to 'increases the potency of Ruin II and Art of War to 160.'
Succor: Cast time is reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds.
Energy Drain: New action added at level 45.
Gravity: Potency increased from 130 to 140. Cast time is reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Helios: Cast time is reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds.
Aspected Helios: Cast time is reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds. Healing potency has been increased from 100 to 200. Barrier's damage nullification reduced from 250% to 125%.
Lightspeed: Recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Hyper Lightspeed: Effect changed from 'Reduces Lightspeed recast time by 10 seconds upon executing Essential Dignity' to 'Reduces Lightspeed recast time to 90 seconds.'

Celestial Opposition: Recast time reduced from 120 to 60 seconds. Healing potency has been increased from 100 to 200. Barrier's damage nullification reduced from 150% to 125%. Regen potency increased from 60 to 100. Effect Radius has been increased from 10 to 15 yalms.
Horoscope: Healing potency during Horoscope increased from 100 to 200. Horoscope Helios effect duration increased from 20 to 30 seconds.
Divination: Recast time reduced from 180 to 120 seconds. Damage increase effect changed from 2%/4%/6% to 4%/5%/6%.
Sleeve Draw: Effect changed to draw a card and grant two stacks of Sleeve Draw; using an arcanum consumes a stack and draws another card.
Celestial Intersection: Healing potency has been increased from 150 to 200. Barrier's damage nullification reduced from 250% to 200%. Regen potency increased from 80 to 150.
HP has been increased from 17,500 to 20,000.
HP has been increased from 17,500 to 20,000.
HP has been increased from 17,500 to 20,000.
HP has been increased from 17,500 to 20,000.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 17,500.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 17,500.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 17,500.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 17,500.
Kaeshi: Higanbana: Cast time has been made instant.
Kaeshi: Goken: Cast time has been made instant.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Cast time has been made instant.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate (Savage)
new_content.description: The Savage version of the Eden's Gate raid. Requires players to speak with Lewrey in Amh Araeng after completing the quest, 'The Next Piece of the Puzzle.'

new_content.name: The Dungeons of Lyhe Ghiah
new_content.description: A special treasure hunt instance similar to the Aquapolis and the Lost Canals of Uznair. Accessed by opening treasure coffers from zonureskin treasure maps.

new_content.name: Return of the Monk
new_content.description: Monk job quest; actions required to complete have been adjusted.

new_content.name: Subaquatic Voyages
new_content.description: Added new destinations, increased level cap to 60, and added new submersible parts.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.description: Heavy Medal and Light Medal mechanics have been removed.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate apocrypha exchange
new_content.description: System to exchange tokens from Eden's Gate (Savage) for gear.
new_content.npc_location: Ghul Gul (Amh Araeng X:26.6 Y:16.4) or Yhal Yal (Eulmore X:10.0 Y:11.5)

new_content.name: New Furnishings and Orchestrion Rolls
new_content.description: Additional items added for housing customization.

housing.name: Magicked Bed
housing.description: This flying furnishing eliminates the need to get up in the morning─or ever. Modern magic put to good use at last!

housing.name: Ruby Crystal Boule
housing.description: A mounted sample of the luminous red crystals that grow uninhibited on the sea floor.

housing.name: Stuffed Fuath
housing.description: The manufacturer of this plush toy assures you that the gleam in its button eye is "mischievous" rather than "murderous."

housing.name: Antique Vessels
housing.description: These remarkably well-preserved vessels, retrieved from their lengthy slumber on the sea floor, probably belong in a museum. Oh well.
